expectations.text: States that implementation uses the tdd skill with an explicit red-green-refactor loop.
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states Phase 5 uses `tdd` with 'red-green-refactor' and repeats that sequence in execution plan.

expectations.text: States that code-simplifier is launched as a subagent for refactoring opportunities.
expectations.evidence: Execution plan includes launching `code-simplifier` with focus on duplication/readability/complexity.

expectations.text: States that quality review is performed by an independent code-reviewer subagent.
expectations.evidence: Calls for independent `code-reviewer` subagent(s) and assigns distinct reviewer focus areas.

expectations.text: Keeps recommendations calibrated to medium-sized feature work instead of escalating unnecessarily.
expectations.evidence: Classifies as Standard track for three-file medium change and avoids escalation to Deep track.
